title: Chicken Tikka Masala
steps: Cut the chicken into bite-sized pieces and marinate in a mixture of yogurt, ginger-garlic paste, garam masala, turmeric, cumin, coriander, and chili powder for at least 30 minutes.
Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat and cook the chicken until browned.
Add the tomato puree and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the heavy cream and simmer for 10-15 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Serve with rice and naan bread.
